title: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions
purpose: Configures Tailwind CSS with custom color palette, fonts, shadows, animations, and typography settings for the UI.
module_context: Exports a default configuration object for Tailwind CSS that defines content paths, theme extensions, dark mode settings, and plugins.

steps.content: Define the content paths that Tailwind should scan for class names.
Extend the default theme with custom accent colors, font families, and shadow definitions.
Register custom keyframe animations for fade and slide effects.
Configure animation durations and easing functions for the custom keyframes.
Set up typography configuration to disable default prose styling for code elements.
Enable dark mode using the class strategy.
Load required Tailwind CSS plugins for forms and typography.
